name: NRX Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
summary: Summary NRx Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: NRXP) (NRx, the Company, we, us or our) is a clinical-stage bio-pharmaceutical company which develops and will distribute, through its wholly-owned operating subsidiary, NeuroRx, Inc., (NeuroRx), novel therapeutics for the treatment of central nervous system disorders including suicidal depression, chronic pain, post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD) and schizophrenia. NRx is additionally the founder and majority owner of HOPE Therapeutics, Inc. (HOPE), ...
